seo_title: Don't post generated/AI-edited comments on HN
meta_description: Reddit's new policy aims to preserve human conversation by discouraging AI-generated and edited comments.
body_html:
direct answer: Reddit's new policy aims to preserve human conversation by discouraging AI-generated and edited comments.

Key Changes to HN GuidelinesAI-generated comments will no longer be allowed on the site.Edited comments that contain significant AI-generated content will also be discouraged.Impact on Community EngagementBenefitOutcomePreservation of human conversationA more authentic and engaging community experience for users.Exceptions and ExemptionsExceptions will be made for comments that are clearly written by humans, such as those from long-time users or experts in the field.

source.title: Don't post generated/AI-edited comments. HN is for conversation between humans
